marks_distribution: Section B: Writing Skills and Grammar - 20 Marks
Section C: Language through Literature - 40 Marks
question_paper_design: Reading Comprehension: Discursive passage (400-450 words, 10 marks) + Case-based factual passage with visual input (200-250 words, 10 marks)
Grammar: Determiners, Tenses, Modals, Subject-verb concord, Reported speech (Gap Filling/Editing/Transformation, 10 marks)
Writing Skills: Descriptive Paragraph (100-120 words, 5 marks) + Story/Diary Entry (100-120 words, 5 marks)
Reference to Context: Extracts from Drama/Prose and Poetry (MCQ/Objective type, 10 marks)
Short Answer Questions: Beehive (4x3=12 marks) + Moments (3x2=6 marks)
Long Answer Questions: Beehive (6 marks) + Moments (6 marks)
competency_weightage: Reading Comprehension: Conceptual understanding, decoding, analyzing, inferring, interpreting, vocabulary
Writing Skills and Grammar: Creative expression, reasoning, justifying, appropriate style/tone/format, fluency, accuracy
Language through Literature: Recalling, reasoning, appreciating, applying literary conventions, theme identification, writer's message understanding
internal_assessment: Listening and Speaking Skills: 05 Marks (Total Internal Assessment 20 marks per circular)
Activities: Role Play, Skit, Dramatization, Art-integrated projects
practical_assessment: Listening and Speaking Skills assessment through oral activities
Classroom interaction via role play and group work
project_assessment: Art-integrated projects based on Role Play, Skit, Dramatization
